    1. update()

Schnittstelle Observer

Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
GUI
public interface Observer
Interface for the Observer in the Observer design pattern.

Implementing classes can be registered to an Observable to be notified of changes.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    update()
    Gets called when the Observable this observer is registered to notifies all observers of a change.

  • Methodendetails

    • update

      void update()
      Gets called when the Observable this observer is registered to notifies all observers of a change.
